completed_tasks.name: Fix subagent spans sharing parent trace_id (process inside workflow span)
Add span_name_prefix to distinguish sub-agent turns from parent turns
Remove turn.number attribute and turn_count from SessionState/hook

Fix silent ss.turn_count crash preventing workflow span export

remaining_tasks.name: Verify turn_count regression is fully resolved — check this session's traces have correct span counts and workflow span
Capture mid-turn queue-operation messages in spans

decisions.decision: Subagent spans emitted inside workflow span's OTel context
decisions.rationale: Ensures subagent spans share parent trace_id instead of getting orphaned with random trace_id
No other Monocle framework uses it; caused confusing numbering across hook invocations

decisions.decision: Span names: 'Claude Code' for parent, 'Sub-Agent: {type}' for subagents
decisions.rationale: Clear visual distinction without turn numbers

decisions.decision: trace_viewer live-reloads modified files via mtime tracking
decisions.rationale: File exporter appends spans across hook invocations; viewer must pick up new spans

decisions.decision: User wants turn_count kept internally for offset tracking but turn.number NOT in exported span attributes
decisions.rationale: Offset management needs turn tracking but the attribute confused trace viewers

next_action: Check .monocle/ for new trace files from this session's 3 turns (resume, Hi, subagent). Verify: (1) each trace has reasonable span count (not 100+), (2) workflow span present, (3) subagent turn shows Sub-Agent spans correctly linked to parent trace_id. Then proceed to task 10 (parentToolUseID correlation).
context_notes: Turn_count regression from previous session is believed fixed — last trace at 12:54 showed 15 spans with workflow span. However 12:28-12:52 traces are all broken (truncated JSON, ~470KB each from massive replay). This session ran 3 turns: (1) /gsd-resume-work with extensive tool use, (2) simple 'Hi' test, (3) subagent spawn (haiku agent listed files, returned CHANGELOG.md). These 3 traces should be in .monocle/ after Stop hooks fire. The broken traces from 12:28-12:52 can be cleaned up or ignored.
